peirce_classification.firstness: SMS from malware exfiltrating PDFs, confidential documents on SD card, reconnaissance searches
peirce_classification.secondness: The malware was installed by Norby on Taog's phone without his knowledge; negotiations with Mr. E show sale attempt
peirce_classification.thirdness: Norby conducted an industrial espionage operation stealing documents from SwiftLogic, using mobile malware for exfiltration, and was killed during the negotiation

null_hypothesis: The documents were legitimately downloaded for authorized competitive analysis and the malware was installed by someone else
scoring_notes: DFRWS 2011 Android. Evidence on personal Dropbox (volatile). README hashes labeled MD5 but are actually SHA1 — phantom mismatch. Needs mirroring + recompute before use.
